entities.name: System Deployment Philosophy
entities.context: Metaphor treating the body like a production environment — no major updates without staging tests

entities.context: Staging/smoke test phase focused on neural re-engagement

entities.context: Load testing phase focused on building tissue resilience

entities.context: Production rollout phase reaching full training capacity
